name: Reuben Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground beef, onion, and ground pepper together and form 4 patties of equal size about 3/4 inch thick.
2. Grill or broil the patties, 4 inches from the heat source, for 3 minutes on each side until medium-rare.
3. Place 1 to 2 tablespoons of sauerkraut on the center of each patty and top with one 1 oz slice of low-fat Swiss cheese.
4. Grill for 1 to 2 minutes, until the cheese melts.
5. Serve each patty open-face on a slice of toasted or grilled light rye bread.
6. Top each serving with 1 tablespoon Russian Dressing.
Joslin Exchange per serving: 3 MEDIUM-FAT EXCHANGES + 1 BREAD/STARCH EXCHANGE
CAL: 348; PRO: 28g; CAR: 18g (CALORIES FROM FAT, 46%); FIB: 1g CHO: 72mg; SODIUM: 460mg POTOSSIUM: 387mg;
Source: Joslin Diabetes Gourmet Cookbook
Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
Not recommended for low-sodium diets unless raw shredded cabbage is substituted for the sauerkraut.
